name: What's New in Windows 10, build 17763 - UWP applications

name: What's new with the Settings app in Windows 10 October 2018 Update
snippet: In this Windows 10 guide, we'll dive deep into the new enhancements, changes, and tweaks available in the Settings app starting with the version 1809.

name: Hide or Show Pages on Settings in Windows 10
snippet: This tutorial will show you how to specify a list of Settings pages to show or hide for all users in Windows 10.

name: Windows 10 1809 Cumulative Update Released with Huge List of Fixes
snippet: Microsoft has finally released the latest cumulative update for Windows 10 build 1809 and with it comes a huge amount of fixes for open issues.
